misc.title: I started with the GBA era, skipped to 3DS, then Switch. Played Pokémon for 1000+ hours on each device. Few years ago I bought original DS/DSi hardware and played all the DS Pokémon games. Nothing com
misc.text: I started with the GBA era, skipped to 3DS, then Switch. Played Pokémon for 1000+ hours on each device. Few years ago I bought original DS/DSi hardware and played all the DS Pokémon games. Nothing comes close to the DS era of Pokémon! For me it's DS > 3DS > NSW > GBA > GBC/GB I only like GBA/GB emulated.

misc.title: Nintendo DS sin ninguna duda. “HeartGold”/“SoulSilver” son directamente los mejores juegos de la saga, “Blanco”/“Negro” (y sus secuelas) son otros juegos de 10, y “Platino” me parce la mejor 3ª versió
misc.text: Nintendo DS sin ninguna duda. “HeartGold”/“SoulSilver” son directamente los mejores juegos de la saga, “Blanco”/“Negro” (y sus secuelas) son otros juegos de 10, y “Platino” me parce la mejor 3ª versión de todas (un poco por encima de “Esmeralda”). Así Nintendo DS gana de calle 🔝 eStarland (@eStarland) Which console has the best Pokémon games? ⚡️ — https://nitter.net/eStarland/status/2027489070264246409#m

misc.title: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Command
misc.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Together, we stand ready to confront shared challenges and deepen our military cooperation for the future. — https://nitter.net/IDF/status/2024762807149854959#m

misc.text: Throwback to when Martin Luther King Jr held the first ever copy of Boruto TBV in his hands. “Boruto isn’t only a great story for showing political power in the world but also how a world without racism can move people’s life. Read Boruto!” - Martin Luther King Jr (1965) #BORUTO

items.text: I started with the GBA era, skipped to 3DS, then Switch. Played Pokémon for 1000+ hours on each device. For me it's DS > 3DS > NSW > GBA > GBC/GB I only like GBA/GB emulated.
